notes: Publishes the bounded numbered exact-repeat compile frontier for one literal capturing group repeated exactly twice inside literal prefix and suffix text.

Documents the module-level numbered exact-repeat search path for the same tiny literal workflow so the published scorecard exposes the final visible capture value after the second repetition completes.

Documents the bound Pattern.fullmatch numbered exact-repeat path without broadening into ranged repeats, quantified alternation, replacement semantics, or capture-history reporting beyond the exposed final group value.
Publishes the matching named exact-repeat compile frontier for one named literal capturing group repeated exactly twice with the same bounded counted shape.

Documents the module-level named exact-repeat search path for the same tiny literal workflow so the published gap records the final named-group payload exposed through CPython's observable match-object API.
Documents the bound Pattern.fullmatch named exact-repeat path without broadening into ranged repeats, quantified alternation, replacement workflows, or broader backtracking.
